ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Gulf of Mexico) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "geo_boundaries" TEXT /* Geographical boundaries of the region (in GeoJSON format) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subregions" (
  "subregion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subregion */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the subregion belongs to */,
  "subregion_name" TEXT /* Name of the subregion (e.g., Flower Garden Banks) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subregion */,
  "parent_subregion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent subregion (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subregion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subregions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_areas" (
  "study_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study area */,
  "subregion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subregion the study area belongs to */,
  "study_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the study area (e.g., East Bank) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study area */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the study area (in GeoJSON format) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_areas_subregion_id FOREIGN KEY ("subregion_id") REFERENCES subregions ("subregion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "study_area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study area where the survey was conducted */,
  "survey_year" INTEGER /* Year the survey was conducted */,
  "batch_code" TEXT /* Batch code for the survey */,
  "survey_index" INTEGER /* Index number for the survey */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was conducted */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the survey location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the survey location */,
  "management" TEXT /* Management type of the survey area (e.g., FGBNMS) */,
  "structure_type" TEXT /* Structure type of the survey area (e.g., HARD, SOFT) */,
  "survey_method" TEXT /* Method used for the survey (e.g., visual census, remote-operated vehicle) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the survey (e.g., sunny, cloudy, rainy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_study_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_area_id") REFERENCES study_areas ("study_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_management FOREIGN KEY ("management") REFERENCES management_types ("management_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "trophic_level" TEXT /* Trophic level of the species (e.g., H, P, I) */,
  "max_length" REAL /* Maximum length of the species in centimeters */,
  "average_weight" REAL /* Average weight of the species in grams */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_species" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey the observation belongs to */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species observed */,
  "fish_length" REAL /* Length of the fish in centimeters */,
  "fish_count" INTEGER /* Count of the fish observed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_species_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_species_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, research institution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the survey data */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey the note belongs to */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was written */,
  "note_author" TEXT /* Name of the author who wrote the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_notes_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "management_types" (
  "management_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each management type */,
  "management_name" TEXT /* Name of the management type (e.g., FGBNMS) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the management type */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the management type was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("management_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_survey_link" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_survey_link_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_survey_link_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_researcher_link" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_researcher_link_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_researcher_link_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each output */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "output_type" TEXT /* Type of the output (e.g., paper, report) */,
  "output_description" TEXT /* Description of the output */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_outputs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species (e.g., vulnerable, endangered) */,
  "threat_level" TEXT /* Threat level of the species (e.g., high, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conservation_status_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)
